title: JPMorgan’s Peters Says Inflation Risks Lurk Beneath Stock Peaks
description: Global fragmentation, artificial intelligence, and inflation are three defining forces shaping markets which have gained urgency due to recent events such as the war in the Middle East, according to JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s Grace Peters.

title: A great code bloat is arising as AI turns managers into software programmers
description: Everyone can now use artificial intelligence (AI) to create software code, but ensuring that these systems actually work reliably is quite another matter. Indeed, this may become the next big role for the software specialists of India’s IT service firms.
content: I recently watched a chief operating officer with a terrifyingly efficient grasp of logistics and a newfound affection for AI models build a global inventory tracker in an afternoon. It was a masterpiece of ‘vibe coding.’ It looked and felt right. To... [5917 chars]

title: Africa Faces GW-Scale Energy Challenge as AI Boom Drives Explosive Data Center Demand
description: The rapid adoption of artificial intelligence technologies is driving one of the largest structural shifts in global electricity consumption in decades.
content:
The global artificial intelligence revolution is rapidly transforming the world's energy landscape, and Africa is now facing mounting pressure to overhaul its electricity planning models as data center demand accelerates toward unprecedented scale.

title: Adani calls for India to build, power, and own AI infrastructure on home soil
description: NEW DELHI, May 11:  Billionaire Gautam Adani said on Monday that energy security and digital infrastructure would define geopolitical power in the coming decades, as he called on India to build sovereign capabilities across the artificial intelligence value chain. Addressing the Confederation of Indian Industry’s (CII) Annual Business Summit 2026, the chairman of the Adani Group said the assumptions underpinning decades of globalisation were being dismantled amid rising geopolitical fragmentation. “The world that is emerging is not flat. It is […]

description: New Delhi [India], May 11: As Indian businesses struggle to keep pace with rising digital advertising costs, changing algorithms and the growing influence of artificial intelligence on consumer behaviour, New Delhi based marketing agency Scale Sense has announced the expansion of its AI first growth infrastructure model designed specifically for Indian brands and MSMEs.

title: UPDATE 1-Deals and new partnerships on the menu at Africa-France summit
description: The Africa Forward ‌Summit is the first France has organised in an English-speaking nation and follows a series of setbacks in West Africa, where some Francophone leaders have cut back on security and commercial links with their erstwhile colonial ruler. Seated alongside Kenyan President William Ruto on a panel discussion with young entrepreneurs about technology and artificial intelligence, Macron said Africa and France were equal partners ‌with common objectives.
content: More than 30 African leaders kicked off a summit with French President Emmanuel Macron in Kenya on Monday, as Paris sought new deals and partnerships amid signs of fading influence in some of its former colonies on the continent. The Africa Forward ‌... [3101 chars]
